title: Waypoint Marks
description: Make your mark on your worlds with Waypoint Marks. The Locator Bar can show the way to places you mark
body:
# Waypoint Marks
Craft a new item called Waypoint Marks to mark locations on your world. The Locator Bar will help guide you to marked locations


### 📝How it works

To craft a Waypoint Mark, you need a lodestone and eight amethyst shards. Surround the lodestone with those shards to craft the Waypoint Mark.

![Waypoint Mark crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71ee3ad4bddb11868a1c1496889ee2d2fdead915.png)

Place the Waypoint Mark anywhere you want, but make sure its atleast two blocks away from another Waypoint Mark. To break the Waypoint Mark, you can punch it and it will instantly break.

### 📅To Be Added
- Color customization
- Modifiable transmition range
